author: mark
text:
bl review: 50/72 commit message shape

Split the -m argument on the first newline: the first line becomes
the commit title with [bl-xxxx] appended, and everything after is
preserved as the commit body with a blank-line separator. Fixes
the unreadable git log --oneline from previous reviews.

New src/commit_msg.rs with format_squash + 7 unit tests. Review
integration test asserts the split happens end-to-end. SKILL.md
teaches agents to pass heredoc-style structured messages.
